title: review-documentation: align preview workflow replay identity
description:
Ref-code: TASK-INGEST-PREVIEW-WORKFLOW
Field: contradicts:UC-INGEST-004

Quoted text:
Preview validates contract versions, selected account identifier, path schema, and advertised limits before opening the source; LedgerContractClient confirms exactly one active ZAR account and statement metadata must agree without inference.
Byte-identical content under the same supported variant is treated as Exact Replay regardless of filename.

Why author input was needed:
The author must align the task and use case on whether selected account and contract versions constrain Exact Replay.

Fingerprint: c5d2f2dff18732eb7315e92ae3aa9ef346cf73f103b27b6b4891b32d93d48403
close_reason: Resolved: TASK-INGEST-PREVIEW-WORKFLOW and UC-INGEST-004 now share the same Exact Replay conditions.

title: review-documentation: align Exact Replay identity requirement
description:
Ref-code: FR-INGEST-STATEMENT-PREVIEW
Field: contradicts:UC-INGEST-004

Quoted text:
Given the same unchanged source content, selected account, adapter version, and LEDGER contract version, when preview is repeated, then it produces the same ordered source-record outcomes, candidate facts, reconciliation evidence, and manifest identity.
Byte-identical content under the same supported variant is treated as Exact Replay regardless of filename.

Why author input was needed:
The author must choose whether selected account and contract versions are part of canonical Exact Replay identity and align the use case.

Fingerprint: 1f3f390b72eaab4f923cea1239a89e6d0c852b1ad05b8167705f44d7170375ad
close_reason: Resolved: requirements, design, glossary, and UC-INGEST-004 now define the four-part Exact Replay key.

title: review-documentation: make encrypted fixture criterion measurable
description:
Ref-code: FR-INGEST-VARIANT-QUALIFICATION
Field: acceptance_criteria[1]

Quoted text:
Given the qualified permission-encrypted fixture that is text-extractable without an opening password, when it is previewed, then the matching adapter processes it under the same passive bounded rules as the other qualified fixtures.

Why author input was needed:
The AC has no co-located measurable target, so the proposed thresholds and adapter-specific outcome require author confirmation.

Fingerprint: 5b5fa4d4cd2d5812ed3b586ddab6ef2d466f23f386ca85bd697c3e59240e0a4a
close_reason: Resolved: the permission-encrypted fixture AC now names exact adapter, reconciliation, passive-extraction, time, memory, and no-LEDGER-mutation outcomes.

title: review-documentation: canonicalize preview workflow replay terms
description:
Ref-code: TASK-INGEST-PREVIEW-WORKFLOW
Field: acceptance_checks[2]

Quoted text:
PreviewStateStore checks selected account plus source fingerprint first: an active or completed exact replay returns prior manifest/status/receipt without reparsing or mutation; only a different source reaches overlap evaluation.

Why author input was needed:
The published replacement combines two non-contiguous terms, so an author must approve a field-level rewrite before apply.

Fingerprint: f834d0121aebe7959d090e92f89d8f0ee331faf18072d4c2d53a942f9aacafa4
close_reason: Resolved: TASK-INGEST-PREVIEW-WORKFLOW now uses canonical Source Fingerprint and Exact Replay terms in a field-level rewrite.

title: review-documentation: clarify private fixture path exception
description:
Ref-code: DD-INGEST-ARTIFACT-SECURITY
Field: contradicts:TASK-INGEST-GATE-EVIDENCE-PRIVATE-FIXTURES

Quoted text:
Carry sourcePath only inside private structured input; open read-only; read a bounded immutable byte buffer; fingerprint the exact bytes; and never persist the path or a source copy.
Each fixture object contains a sourcePath plus expected statementPeriod, accountEvidence, orderedRecords, and reconciliation controls sufficient to assert every source row, exact available balance control, and variant identity; values remain private.

Why author input was needed:
The author must decide whether the ignored fixture manifest is an explicit test-evidence exception or must become path-free.

Fingerprint: 6372bfaa350c2a07d97b75b2f7339e49373b784a752d391e2582cb0374d3455a
close_reason: Resolved: DD-INGEST-ARTIFACT-SECURITY and the fixture task now allow only ignored repository-relative sourcePath locators below docs/statements and prohibit their escape.
